fields.heading: Eastern Shotokan Karate Association
fields.body: Check this screen for today's reminders, events, courses, and student achievements.
fields.cta: Train hard. Be kind. Keep improving.

fields.heading: Please arrive ready to train
fields.subheading: Quick reminders for students and parents
fields.body: Bring water, your licence book, and the correct uniform. Speak to reception if you need help.

fields.heading: Seminars, gradings and special training
fields.body: New event details can be added here as soon as they are confirmed.

fields.heading: Dates for your diary
fields.subheading: Add upcoming events, courses, gradings and closures here
fields.body: Keep checking this screen for confirmed dates and booking reminders.
fields.date: Sat 18 Jul | Summer Seminar | Main Dojo
fields.time: Mon 27 Jul | Grading Week | During normal classes
fields.location: Sun 2 Aug | Open Training | Ask reception

fields.heading: Upcoming grading dates
fields.body: Speak to your instructor if you are unsure which grading you should attend.

fields.heading: Don't forget to book your classes
fields.subheading: Help us keep sessions smooth and well organised
fields.body: Please book before arriving so instructors can plan the class properly.

fields.heading: Book a 1-to-1 PT session
fields.body: Work on grading prep, confidence, fitness, kata, kumite, or specific techniques with dedicated instructor time.

fields.heading: ESKA Karate Courses
fields.subheading: Start or continue your karate journey
fields.body: Build confidence, technique, fitness, and focus with structured coaching.

fields.heading: Photo and video space
fields.subheading: Use this for instructor clips or course highlights
fields.body: Upload a picture and add a video link or uploaded video file.

fields.heading: Well done to everyone who competed
fields.body: Great effort, attitude, and spirit from the ESKA team.
